selections.name: Tilt A Twirl
selections.reason: Boasts a strong 104 speed figure and 109 class rating. Projects to get a perfect trip from the inside.

selections.name: Flick
selections.reason: Has the highest overall speed figure (106) in the field and should appreciate the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Rugged Love
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 114 class rating. Should be closing late and picking up the pieces.

selections.name: The Hund
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 100 speed figure. Can hit the board at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: Reb
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail and has back class; could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Gardiner
selections.reason: Standout on paper with a 109 speed and 112 class rating. Drops in class and should dominate.

selections.name: Slider
selections.reason: Owns a 111 speed figure and fits well at this level. The main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Curlin's Gesture

selections.name: Raising Kane
selections.reason: Solid class rating (95) and can close into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Slim Slow Slider
danger_horse.reason: Veteran with tactical speed; dangerous if left alone early.

selections.reason: First-time starter for Brad Cox with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Workouts suggest she is ready to fire.

selections.name: Starfinder

selections.name: Dance Like This

selections.name: Extra Benefits
